final:
module ring_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output [9:0] count
);

    reg [9:0] invalid_counter;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            invalid_counter <= 10'b0000000001;  // Reset the counter to 0000000001
        end else begin
            invalid_counter <= {invalid_counter[8:0], invalid_counter[9]};  // Rotate the bits
        end
    end

    assign count = invalid_counter;

endmodule
